title: Digital Engagement Platform Deployment
recommended_actions: Move new build Corp-online.war to same path
Execute restart procedure after build movement
Move new build admin-online.war to same path
Execute restart procedure after build movement
For accounts_coar: Backup existing in /rpool1/CBXR-FO/OF/OliveFabricRuntime/OF_Deployments/accounts/deployment, Move new build to same path, Execute restart
For billpayments_coar: Backup existing in /rpool1/CBXR-FO/OF/OliveFabricRuntime/OF_Deployments/billpayments/deployment, Move new build to same path, Execute restart
For bulkpayments_coar: Backup existing in /rpool1/CBXR-FO/OF/OliveFabricRuntime/OF_Deployments/bulkpayments/deployment, Move new build to same path, Execute restart
For workflow_coar: Backup existing in /rpool1/CBXR-FO/OF/OliveFabricRuntime/OF_Deployments/businessprocess/deployment, Move new build to same path, Execute restart
For common_coar: Backup existing in /rpool1/CBXR-FO/OF/OliveFabricRuntime/OF_Deployments/common/deployment, Move new build to same path, Execute restart
For customers_coar: Backup existing in /rpool1/CBXR-FO/OF/OliveFabricRuntime/OF_Deployments/customers/deployment, Move new build to same path, Execute restart
For iam_coar: Backup existing in /rpool1/CBXR-FO/OF/OliveFabricRuntime/OF_Deployments/iam/deployment, Move new build to same path, Execute restart
For transfers_coar: Backup existing in /rpool1/CBXR-FO/OF/OliveFabricRuntime/OF_Deployments/transfers/deployment, Move new build to same path, Execute restart
For admin_coar: Backup existing in /rpool1/CBXR-BO/OF/OliveFabricRuntime/OF_Deployments/deployment, Move new build to same path, Execute restart
notes: Multiple deployment types: WAR files and COAR files
Restart order critical: BO first, then FO
DR environment must be updated within 72 hours
Coordinate with change management using flexidocs for scheduling
